title: Oxygen X is Powering Nigerians Through Sustainable Digital Lending - FinancialEDGE
description: Oxygen X Finance Company Limited, the digital lending subsidiary of Access Holdings Plc, is redefining access to credit in Nigeria through bold innovation, sustainable growth, and a clear purpose: to make a positive impact in Africa.
